text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
64 
PTRA_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for post-traumatic stress 
disorder as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: PTRA_MEDICARE 
LONG NAME: PTRA_MEDICARE 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1
